text:
Brian is one of the four cosplayers dressed as a Survey Corps soldier in Attack on Demoncon, the tenth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Brian has ginger hair and during the Demoncon, he wears the Survey Corps uniform with a white shirt and two fake swords.

Story

Brian attends the Demoncon with Jemaine, Gin and John. Noticing a trio of three women dressed as Colossus Titans, he states it would be good for them, who are dressed as Survey Corps soldiers, to approach them. They do so and the two groups put on a show for the other cosplayers.

As one of the women, Lisa, slaps Gin, Brian tries to separate them, asking what happened. Gin, who had gropped her, tries to apologize but Lisa gets furious and transforms into the Colossus Titan. Noticing it, Brian, Gin and John react as if they were Survey Corps members and charge at her. He witnesses John being crushed by Lisa and wanting to avenge him, Brian attacks Lisa. She grabs him and out of desperation, Brian pleads her to do as she wishes to his friends but before he can finish his words, his head is crushed between the teeth of the Colossus Titan.

When Lisa gets out of her fantasy, Brian and the others lay injured on the floor.
